errors.text: Magazine Alpha stores 800 kg NEQ of HD 1.1 artillery shells and 300 kg NEQ of HD 1.5 insensitive munitions. The combined storage is classified and treated as HD 1.1 for all quantity-distance calculations.
errors.reasoning: The provided context lists NEQ limits for HD 1.1, 1.2, 1.3, 1.4 but contains no rule regarding the handling of mixed Hazard Division 1.5 ammunition or the practice of classifying combined storage as HD 1.1. Without such guidance, compliance cannot be determined.
